steps.t: Gather wood for makeshift traps near Sâkhazai in Kighân. Sâkhazai is located north-west of Ingar-garâsh.
Set the first makeshift trap in Dân Shatagan for the jázgai matron.
Set the second makeshift trap in Dân Shatagan for the jázgai matron.
Set the third makeshift trap in Dân Shatagan for the jázgai matron.
Return to Razâl in Ingar-garâsh with news of your triumph.
